title: German-Style Roasted Rice Bowl
description: A hearty, comforting German-inspired dish featuring roasted vegetables, fragrant rice, and quinoa in a flavorful bowl.

ingredients.name: Roasted Vegetables (carrots, zucchini, bell peppers)
ingredients.notes: Pre-cooked roasted vegetables from the oven

instructions: 1. Cook the fragrant rice and quinoa according to package instructions.
2. Roast the pre-cooked vegetables with a drizzle of olive oil and seasonings to taste.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cooked rice, quinoa, and roasted vegetables.
4. Drizzle Russian dressing over the top and toss to combine.
5. Garnish with sliced scallions and crumbled feta cheese (if using).
6. Serve warm or at room temperature.
